description_long: This object is a realistic representation of an eggplant, featuring a deep purple, slightly bulbous body that tapers towards the top. The skin appears smooth with subtle gradients of purple and hints of blue, giving it a natural, organic look. At the top, a green calyx with multiple pointed lobes wraps around the stem, which is short and slightly angular. The calyx is textured and contrasts sharply with the glossy body of the eggplant. The overall shape is slightly asymmetrical, with gentle faceting that mimics the natural irregularities of a real eggplant. The object is visually solid and dense, with no visible openings or cut surfaces.
description: A deep purple, glossy eggplant with a green, lobed calyx and a smooth, slightly asymmetrical body.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full purple body and the green calyx with pointed lobes clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curvature of the body and the calyx extending over the top edge.
description_view_2: Rear view with the calyx partially obscuring the top and the body appearing more rounded.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the widest part of the body and the calyx extending downward.
